description: record an ATTRIBUTED human testimony into a tamper-evident attest-ledger (grade: testimony) — records who witnessed what, never anonymously; does not verify the claim's truth
rules: a testimony is never anonymous — ATTESTED_BY is required, fail-closed
records attribution, does NOT verify the claim (that is the honest boundary of testimony vs redeem's governed-run evidence)
prev-hash chained (infra.cwp.ledger) — editing the claim or attributor breaks the chain, which cws-ledgercheck/verify reports
usage: Set CLAIM (the statement) + ATTESTED_BY (the attributor). Optional GRADE (default 'testimony'), ATTEST_LEDGER (default RECORD_STORE/attest-ledger.json). Output: attest.json + the appended chain.
limitation: Records the testimony attributably; it cannot and does not verify that the claim is true.

vars.CLAIM: an outsider completed one governed run in under 1h from public docs alone
